properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 96/20

NAVAREA XIX HAS COMMENCED ITS INITIAL OPERATIONAL CAPABILITY (IOC) PHASE FOR IRIDIUM SAFETYCAST NAVIGATIONAL WARNINGS.
THE NORWEGIAN COASTAL ADMINISTRATION, AS THE NAVAREA XIX COORDINATOR WILL PROMULGATE SAFETYCAST MESSAGES
AS PART OF A NUMBERED SERIES DURING IOC IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE JOINT IMO/IHO/WMO MARITIME SAFETY INFORMATION MANUAL.
MESSAGES MAY BE INTERMITTENT AND WILL ALSO BE SUPPLEMENTED BY TEST MESSAGES 
WHICH WILL BE CLEARLY DEFINED IN THE MESSAGE HEADER. 
MARINERS ARE ADVISED THAT IOC WILL BE IN PLACE UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE. 
ON VESSELS WITH IRIDIUM GMDSS TERMINALS INSTALLED, MARINERS ARE ADVISED TO CHECK THEIR MANUFACTURER’S OPERATION MANUALS 
TO OBTAIN INFORMATION ON THE SETTING OF THEIR SAFETYCAST RECEIVERS TO RECEIVE RELEVANT SAFETYCAST MESSAGES. 
SEE NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINERS (EFS) 17 FOR FURTHER INFORMATION. 
CONTACT INFORMATION FOR NAVAREA XIX; PHONE: +47 78 98 98 98, FAX: +47 78 98 98 99, EMAIL: NAVAREA19@KYSTVERKET.NO
